question: List the dates of the orders which were placed at the earliest time or have more than 1 items.
sql: SELECT date_order_placed FROM Orders WHERE date_order_placed = (SELECT MIN(date_order_placed) FROM Orders) OR order_id IN (SELECT order_id FROM Order_Items GROUP BY order_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)

back_translation.intent: 查询最早下单日期的订单或包含多个商品项的订单
filters: order_id IN (SELECT order_id FROM Order_Items GROUP BY order_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)

semantic.reason: 过滤条件逻辑错误，原始问题要求'最早下单日期的订单或包含多个商品项的订单'，但SQL描述中两个条件被隐式视为AND关系，实际应使用OR连接
